content: Phase 1: POC complete - all 8 user stories passing
Phase 2: Get design guidelines for trading dashboard
Phase 2: Build backend (FastAPI) - market data, strategy, paper executor, risk, journal, TV webhook, graph builder
Phase 2: Build frontend (React) - Live Monitor, Signals, Force-Graph, Trades, Risk, Settings
Phase 2: E2E testing via testing_agent_v3 - 100% pass (62/62 backend, all frontend)
Phase 3 (optional): LIVE trading hardening - credentials, balances, latency profiling - can be added on request
